skill_purpose: Run a provenance-first pipeline from corpus markdown to layered terms, mechanisms, behavioral story maps, and sparse domain types with explicit validation gates and reproducible bundle manifests under the MM3 fixture.
target_audience: Authors and operators running this skill locally; reviewers of map-model-spec artifacts.
scope_in: Phase 2 terms / mechanisms / candidate queue JSON
Bundle manifest hashing for test/mm3 sources and outputs
scope_out: Full LLM extraction of chunks from canonical markdown (Phase 1 rebuild — separate tooling; sources from solution.conf manifest_sources)
Production deployment beyond the skill repo
operator_expectations: compileall on scripts; build.py runs pipeline; scanner_pipeline_outputs.py checks phase0 + phase2 files exist.
rules_and_scanners: Curated markdown rules under rules/ with YAML phase_files; build inlines per content/built/phases/*.md. Validators: validate_context_contract.py, validate_phase3_story_map.py (story evidence vs index), scanners/chunks_must_be_referenced.py (map-model-spec citations), scanner_pipeline_outputs.py, manifest.
constraints: Secrets not required for pipeline smoke; OpenAI only if expert critique invoked externally.
notes: Output root is test/mm3/abd-maps-models-specs/ — not the skill package root.
